issues.description: Logic bug: Boundary condition at 30 days is incorrect. The code checks 'days_remaining < 30' for yellow, and 'else' returns green. This means exactly 30 days returns 'green', but per FR-01 spec (green >30 days), 30 days should be 'yellow'. The test test_dashboard_color_boundary_yellow_at_30_days expects yellow at 30 days but gets green.
issues.suggestion: Change 'elif days_remaining < 30:' to 'elif days_remaining <= 30:' so that 30 days falls into the yellow category, matching the FR-01 specification.

summary: FR-01 implementation is nearly complete but has a boundary logic bug in the color coding. At exactly 30 days remaining, the code returns 'green' instead of 'yellow' because the condition checks '< 30' rather than '<= 30'. This contradicts the FR-01 specification which states 'green >30 days' (strictly greater than). The test expects yellow at 30 days but receives green. Fix the boundary condition in get_status_color().
